item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: Video Memes Vol 4
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Prince died on April 21, 2016, at age 57 from an accidental fentanyl overdose at his Paisley Park home in Minnesota. A small sampling of his talent.
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LNrAFb3I2js
Full performance https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dWRCooFKk3c
I'll be honest, Prince was not an artist I followed in my younger days. I only grew to recognize his amazing talent till later in life. A simple search on Imgur will show a shit-ton of Prince Posts. https://imgur.com/t/prince
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Troll Level: OVER 9000!
item.description: The Kuban Agrarian University in Russia decided to invite a Russian soldier fighting in Ukraine to speak online to a room full of their students to encourage them to sign up with the Russian Army. Instead, a Ukrainian soldier appeared on the screen...

24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @tanbeliaart did this painting of NYC. Love it. Check out their other posts for more.
27 Man Tax: Gauthier Battoue
“The universe is an intelligence test.” - Timothy Leary So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The troubling thing isn't Trump because he's gonna Trump, it's the people and media apparatus around him that allows him to get away with everything. There's some nefarious secret as to why he's being given the Make-A-Wish treatment, but I don't know what

item.title: Wake up with Shadow and Chance
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: She places it modestly, yet accurately
item.description: I still go out for walks late at night. I just make sure to carry the right gear and I also know how to use my limbs. Regardless, women shouldn't *have* to be on guard at all times. The patriarchy has to end.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Memes vol 667
item.description:
Lead me places I wouldn’t even go with a gun
Look at this. “Young Republicans” and not a single one looks under the age of 40. The republicanism makes it that way
Me on my drive to work and then after being there for 5 minutes
This is so funny because “this picture makes me so sad” and I’m willing go bet my hypothetical left testicle that HE MADE IT AND GAVE HER *NINE* DEAD CHILDREN WTF you did this to yourself!!
That’s so sexy
It’s my ringtone
Bruce tax
Big Mama and Gertie tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: I 3D printed a tourbillon clock
item.description: It took me two years to design this masterpiece, a fully functional clock. There are total of 395 printed parts.
item.dc:creator: tomaszfortyfour

item.title: GovBrief Today #447
item.description: The country's top cop spent this week suing The Atlantic and sending his FBI after a New York Times reporter. The reporter had called Patel's 27-year-old girlfriend while writing about the FBI SWAT team that guards her full-time. Yesterday, a federal judge tossed Patel's other defamation suit as "rhetorical hyperbole," and at a press conference announcing the SPLC indictment, Patel polled reporters on whether a detail in his own lawsuit was true. America is 56 days into a war with Iran and three months into a government shutdown. Its FBI director sues journalists with his personal lawyers and investigates them with the FBI. He is not up to the task of keeping the country safe. Call your representatives through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand they publicly call for Patel's resignation. We've emailed 7,100+ stories over 447 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Easy click links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260422-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr22 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/covid-vaccine-report [3] https://go.govbrief.today/oversight-maxwell [4] https://go.govbrief.today/desantis-dei [5] https://go.govbrief.today/virginia-redistricting-blocked [6] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-investigate-reporter [7] https://go.govbrief.today/phelan-fired [8] https://go.govbrief.today/page-settlement [9] https://go.govbrief.today/patel-defamation [10] https://go.govbrief.today/plankey-withdraws [11] https://go.govbrief.today/david-scott [12] https://go.govbrief.today/keane-mia [13] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-ice-budget [14] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-pay-ending [15] https://go.govbrief.today/iowa-detainee Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Welcome to the Ocean! Dump #3 (Fish + Sharks)
item.description: Welcome to the ocean! It's been a while and I've saved a lot of videos. This one will be about sharks and fish with a few others thrown in. Hopefully, I can post more in the next couple days. Enjoy! (I haven't reviewed audio on videos, sorry!) Most viral! Send nudibranches haha
item.dc:creator: Dippstix90

item.title: I havent seen a 1 in front of this number since i was 13. Im 37. I saw a 3 in front of it a few years ago. I don't know if my mind can handle seeing a 1 in front again
item.dc:creator: ReposterCallerOuterMan

item.title: Enjoy the video in case Winter wouldn't come around again
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: Return of the meme: 1676 (outlook)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
this is a mood
Day Three of the Lazuli Bunting siege continues. I left my camera in the car today though, but the flock (though diminished, it seems four have left overnight leaving only three others) continues. Most beautiful siege ever. Pippin seems to be fascinated by these tiny blue borbs bouncing around outside and beeps at them or sits at the window asking "what doing?" while looking out at them, which is a complete 180 from his reaction to Cardinals, which is to make alarm calls or scream at them. I'll try and post the best photos I've taken in a photo dump later this week.
I mean....
My kind of friend group.
Sparrows
Aaaaaaaaaaaaaa
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "okay okay beep beep" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Misty brings a present for mom
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: La Rueda Falkirk, es un ascensor de barcos giratorio que conecta el canal Forth y Clyde con el canal Union en Escocia -The Kilted Photographe-
item.description: DeepL Translator. – The Falkirk Wheel is a rotating boat lift that connects the Forth and Clyde Canal with the Union Canal in Scotland – The Kilted Photographe –
item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018
